blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: Campbelle in tears as West Indies seal famous win against New Zealand. Watch the moment West Indies seal victory in an frenetic run chase against defending champions New Zealand, as they reached 163 with a ball to spare, with Shemaine Campbelle finishing unbeaten on 90 i

Watch the moment West Indies seal victory in an frenetic run chase against defending champions New Zealand, as they reached 163 with a ball to spare, with Shemaine Campbelle finishing unbeaten on 90 in their opening match of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup in Southampton.
